title: Gantt Chart
scenario: Create a Gantt chart for a marketing campaign. The chart should include tasks, start and end dates, and dependencies between tasks. The chart should be generated in an image format (PNG or SVG) and should be no more than 200KB in size.
constraints: Must be no more than 200KB in size
Must include start and end dates

evaluationCriteria.description: The chart adheres to the constraints (size, tasks, dates)
The image quality is good and the chart is clear and readable
The content is accurate and includes relevant information
